text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh… I hope Urara made it to training on time…

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I woke her up before I left, but what if 
she fell asleep aga—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No, no, stop that. A first-rate trainee like 
me shouldn't be worrying about that.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
…Starting tomorrow, she'll have to 
wake herself up.
